_README: Map friendly names to Qualtrics question numbers. Open output/codebook.csv to see what each number asked. Edit 'questions', then run notebooks 2 and 3. Fill 'attention_checks' with {question_code: expected_answer} if your survey has any. This file ships pre-filled for the included sample data; delete it (or delete the 'questions' you don't want) and re-run notebook 1 to regenerate from your own export.
